section.container: relative py-24 px-4 overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-b from-white via-[#0a91b1]/5 to-white

header.subtitle: inline-block px-4 py-1.5 mb-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-full bg-[#0a91b1]/10 text-[#0a91b1] border border-[#0a91b1]/20
header.title: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold text-gray-900 leading-tight mb-6

benefitCard.gradientBackground: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0a91b1]/5 to-[#0a91b1]/5 rounded-2xl opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-500

content.container: relative p-8 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 h-full border border-gray-100
content.iconContainer: w-14 h-14 mb-6 rounded-xl bg-[#0a91b1]/10 flex items-center justify-center group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300
content.title: text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4 group-hover:text-[#0a91b1] transition-colors duration-300

trustIndicators.container: mt-16 flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-8 md:gap-16

stat.value: text-3xl font-bold text-[#0a91b1] mb-1 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300
stat.label: text-gray-600
